2026-03-30FINPension Benefits Standards Act, 1985Order Approving the designation of the Bank of Canada for the purposes of subsection 10.3(1) of the Pension Benefits Standards Act, 1985Order approving the designation of the Bank of Canada as the entity that will administer the pension assets of a person who cannot be located.N/A
subject: Order Approving the designation of the Bank of Canada for the purposes of subsection 10.3(1) of the Pension Benefits Standards Act, 1985
precis: Order approving the designation of the Bank of Canada as the entity that will administer the pension assets of a person who cannot be located.
